etymology.description: 目(目) (mù, "eye") + 袁(袁) (yuán, abbreviation) = the eye component confers meaning, while the phonetic 袁 suggests sound -> inspect
etymology.interpretation: The character 睘 (jué, "inspect") combines 目(目) (mù, "eye") as the semantic element indicating observation or viewing with 袁(袁) (yuán), serving as the phonetic component. This combination suggests the act of inspecting or observing carefully, a logical association given the focus on the eye in the character's etymology.
